findings.summary: Narmada Agro Mills reports steady procurement and processing volumes with no adverse compliance observations.
findings.source_title: Agro Processing MSMEs Maintain Stable Output
findings.raw_snippet: Regional agro-processing firms in MP maintained throughput and payment discipline in FY25.

findings.summary: MCA records show no strike-off actions, fraud proceedings, or NCLT distress filings against Narmada Agro Mills Pvt Ltd.
findings.raw_snippet: No adverse MCA records found for Narmada Agro Mills Pvt Ltd and its directors.
